title: scandix stellata subsp. velutina
intro: Scandix stellata subsp. velutina, also known as the Lesser Burnet, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as arthritis, urinary tract infections, and digestive issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, kill bacteria, and increase urine production, which in turn can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Scandix stellata subsp. velutina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal benefits, allowing users to harness its potential in a variety of herbal preparations.
